## stdout // the big story
### Apple sues OpenAI over alleged trade secret theft *[breakthrough]* - Apple alleges the misconduct was directed by OpenAI's senior leadership, including a longtime former employee.

## stdout // the big story
### Claude Cowork expands to mobile and web *[breakthrough]* - With this update, users can start a task from their desk, get status updates on their phone, and pick up the finished output later — even if their laptop is closed.

## stdout // the big story
### AI agents are not your “coworkers” [PAYWALL] *[tool]* - This story originally appeared in The Algorithm, our weekly newsletter on AI. To get stories like this in your inbox first, sign up here. Imagine coming in to work to learn that a new underling will report to you. The worker is not a person but an AI tool

## stdout // the big story
### Everything New in iOS 27 Beta 2 *[tool]* - Apple released the second beta of iOS 27 today, and as is common with a second beta, there are multiple changes. There are new features and updates to existing features as Apple prepares for a July public beta and a September software launch. Write with Siri There is
